commentaries.author: A Treatise Against the Heretic Novatian
commentaries.content: And I saw the dead, great and small, standing before the sight of the Lord's throne: and the books were opened; and another book was opened, which is (the book) of life: and every one was judged according to those things that were written in the book, according to their own works."

commentaries.author: Hippolytus of Rome
commentaries.content: From Thy presence the whole earth fleeth away,

commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: For after the times of the kingdom, he says, "I saw a great white throne, and Him who sat upon it, from whose face the earth fled away, and the heavens; and there was no more place for them."

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: "and there was found no place for them"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
